entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 and currently operated under the OrangeX.com brand through an entity identified publicly as OrangeX.com LLC.
entity.notes: Independent exchange coverage supports the 2021 establishment year and Seychelles registration. The official About page identifies OrangeX.com LLC as the brand operator, but publicly accessible terms do not clearly resolve the complete group structure or incorporation details, so confidence remains medium.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the OrangeX brand.

changes.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2021 and currently operated under the OrangeX.com brand through an entity identified publicly as OrangeX.com LLC.
changes.notes: Independent exchange coverage supports the 2021 establishment year and Seychelles registration. The official About page identifies OrangeX.com LLC as the brand operator, but publicly accessible terms do not clearly resolve the complete group structure or incorporation details, so confidence remains medium.

events.title: OrangeX was established in 2021
events.description: OrangeX was established in 2021 as a Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange.
events.notes: The reviewed independent sources establish the year and registration jurisdiction but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.notes: Official company page identifies OrangeX.com LLC as the operator and legal owner of the OrangeX.com brand and associated products.
